tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows elevated creatinine, significant proteinuria, and abnormal urine findings (cloudy, brown, low specific gravity), suggesting possible renal impairment or nephrotic syndrome. Hypoglycemia and low HbA1c are noted, with mild glycosuria and ketonuria, possibly indicating altered glucose metabolism or recent hypoglycemic episodes. No evidence of urinary tract infection. Recommend further nephrological evaluation and assessment of glycemic status.

display.value: Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
